templates.name: Where can I find the Exercise Program I purchased?
templates.content: If you've purchased our Exercise Program, you can access your account by clicking the following link and entering your username and password to login: https://www.hypothyroidismexercise.com/members/login

templates.name: How do I update the billing information for my subscription?
templates.content: Please log into your account. In the "Billing Information" tab you'll find the current method of payment along with the current billing address. Simply edit the address in this section if your billing address has changed or if you need to update your email address.

templates.name: Where can I find the Hypothyroidism Program I purchased?
templates.content: If you've purchased our Hypothyroidism Revolution Program, you can access your account by clicking the following link and entering your username and password to log in: https://www.hypothyroidismrevolution.com/members/login/

templates.name: Which Thyroid supplement would you recommend?
templates.content: I'd recommend taking our thyroid supplement quiz in order to find out which supplements your thyroid can't live without. Plus, you can get your own Personalized Thyroid Supplement Plan. You can start here: https://www.forefronthealth.com/lp/thyroid-supplement-quiz/

templates.name: How do I spend my Thyroid Bucks?
templates.content: First, log in to your account and click on the "Get Rewards" button on the bottom left-hand corner of your screen. Make sure to use the same email you used during checkout. Once you've logged in, your account balance will appear at the top of the launcher. Scroll down and click on "All rewards" at which point a "Redeem" button will appear. Upon clicking "Redeem", you will be taken to a page that shows the coupon code with a button to "Apply code", which will automatically apply the code to the checkout. Depending on the amount of points you have accrued, you might have to move the little slider to determine how many points you wish to use at this time.

templates.name: Where can I find the Ultimate Thyroid Boosting Meal Plan I purchased?
templates.content: If you've purchased our Ultimate Thyroid Boosting Meal Plan, you can access your account by clicking the following link and entering your username and password to login: https://www.forefronthealth.com/members/login/

templates.name: How do I access my rewards account and view my Thyroid Bucks?
templates.content: In order to view the amount of Thyroid Bucks you have accrued, you must first log in to your account and click on the "Get Rewards" button on the bottom left-hand corner of your screen. Once you've logged in, your account balance will appear at the top of the launcher.

templates.name: How do I update my shipping address?
templates.content: Once logged in, click on "Subscriptions" and click "Edit" to the right of the address. This will take you to a page where you can modify your shipping address fields. Please note that this only affects the shipping/delivery address, and does not update the billing information related to the method of payment.

templates.name: When is your birthday?
templates.content: We thank you for giving us the opportunity to celebrate your birthday together. Keep an eye out for something special on your big day!

templates.name: How do I swap one product for a different one?
templates.content: Once logged in, select the "Subscriptions" tab to view the current subscription products. On the far right, you can select "Swap" and select the replacement product.

templates.name: Are all of your products Vegan?
templates.content: Most of our products are vegan friendly with the exception of our Raw Desiccated Thyroid and Collagen Protein Powder, which are both derived from Bovine (cows).

templates.name: Where are your products made / manufactured?
templates.content: All of our supplements are manufactured right here in the USA!

templates.name: How do I skip a delivery?
templates.content: Once logged in, click on "Delivery Schedule" on the left to see all upcoming deliveries for your subscriptions. To skip a delivery, you can click "Skip" next to the delivery you would like to skip. Similarly, to unskip a delivery, you would click "Unskip" next to the order.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://shop.forefronthealth.com/pages/return-policy

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, or DHL. Once shipped, it will typically take 6-10 business days for First Class and 2-3 for Priority. For international orders, it can take between 10-20 days depending on the country and the selected shipping method.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $99. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Can I take your products while pregnant?
templates.content: We recommend consulting your doctor before starting a supplement regimen while pregnant.

templates.name: How do I add a product to my subscription?
templates.content: Once logged in, select the "Subscriptions" tab, then click "Add Product". This will open a pop-up where you can search, view, and select additional products to add to your upcoming deliveries. You may also choose the frequency and first shipment date.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@forefronthealth.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How do I cancel my subscription?
templates.content: In order to cancel your subscription, you will first need to log in to your account. Within the "Subscriptions" tab, click the "Cancel" link next to the subscription order you would like to cancel. On the following page, you will be prompted to enter a cancellation reason.

templates.name: Rewards / referral program
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://shop.forefronthealth.com/#smile-home

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address, and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Do you have a guide or resource I can use that includes best practices and suggested use for each one of your supplements?
templates.content: We most certainly do! Simply click the link here ( https://forefronthealth.com/resources/FH-Supplement-Cheat-Sheet.pdf ) and grab a copy of our Supplement Cheat Sheet where we review our recommended dosage guide and suggested use for each one of our products.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at support@forefronthealth.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at support@forefronthealth.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Why can’t you ship to my country?
templates.content: Sorry about that! Certain countries are embargoed or restricted by the US government. Others have strict import laws when it comes to shipping supplements across borders. Current countries that are unable to receive orders due to strict supplement laws include: Germany, Austria, Spain, Norway, Sweden, South Africa, and Slovenia.

templates.name: When is the best time to take your products?
templates.content: You can check out our Supplement Cheat Sheet for our complete list of product usage recommendations here: https://forefronthealth.com/resources/FH-Supplement-Cheat-Sheet.pdf Generally speaking, morning is always going to be your best bet, but make sure to reference our guide for complete details.

templates.name: Can I take Raw Desiccated Thyroid if I’m currently taking thyroid medication?
templates.content:
The short answer is, yes, you can! Our Raw Desiccated Thyroid can be used with your existing thyroid medication (i.e. levothyroxine, NDT, etc.) For more specific instructions, please see our 5 Step Thyroid Dosing and Troubleshooting Guide here: https://www.forefronthealth.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/Thyroid-Multi-Dosing-Guide.pdf 

We recommend using our Raw Desiccated Thyroid in addition to your medication, not as a replacement. However, we still recommend consulting your doctor before starting a thyroid dosing regimen.

templates.name: How long does ADK vitamin supplement last?
templates.content: One bottle of the Vitamin ADK lasts 60 days when taken 7 drops 3 times daily.

templates.name: Do you provide return label?
templates.content: As a growing company, we do not provide return labels or cover the cost of shipping for returns, with the exception of it being a mishap on our end.

templates.name: What do you recommend I start with? recommendation product quiz
templates.content: I would recommend starting by taking our Supplement Quiz https://forefronthealth.attn.tv/aKpojGXwdB0Q/ to get a better understanding of where you may want to begin.
